title: The Bat and the Weasels
lines: A Bat was caught by a Weasel.
"I shall eat you," said the Weasel; "for I eat all birds."
"I am not a bird," protested the Bat; "I am a mouse, and we are friends."
Soon after, the same Bat was caught by another Weasel.
"I shall eat you," said this Weasel; "for I eat all mice."
"I am not a mouse," protested the Bat; "I am a bird."
This Weasel also let him go.
Thus the Bat escaped danger by being ready to call himself by different names.
moral: It is wise to adapt to circumstances.
